entity.name: Ashutosh0x
entity.description: Maintainer of rust-finance, an open-source Rust trading terminal focused on real-time market data, execution workflows, quantitative risk controls, compliance checks, and terminal dashboards.

projects.name: rust-finance
projects.description: Open-source AI trading terminal written in Rust. The workspace includes multi-exchange market-data ingestion, execution components, risk models, compliance checks, FIX parsing, persistence, backtesting, and a Ratatui dashboard. Funding supports maintenance, security work, documentation, test coverage, dependency review, and continued development of reliable open-source financial tooling.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors for one-time or recurring project support.
thanks.dev dependency-graph funding for open-source maintainers.
Buy Me a Coffee for one-time community support.

plans.name: Community support
plans.description: Flexible one-time or recurring support for maintenance, documentation, issue triage, and release work.

plans.name: Security and maintenance grant
plans.description: Funding for dependency audits, CI hardening, vulnerability response, parser hardening, fuzzing, and reliability work across the Rust workspace.

plans.name: Project sustainability
plans.description: Funding to support sustained development of open-source Rust financial infrastructure, including exchange adapters, risk controls, compliance logic, testing, and user documentation.
